indicators.name: bed
indicators.rationale: The bed is a significant obstacle to setting up a computer workstation, as it takes up a large portion of the space and is not suitable for prolonged sitting.

indicators.name: large window
indicators.rationale: The large window can be a source of distraction and may require additional measures to block out external noise and light for focused work.

indicators.name: low lighting
indicators.rationale: The lighting appears to be soft and ambient, which may not be sufficient for tasks requiring high contrast and sharp vision, such as reading or typing on a screen.

indicators.name: minimal furniture
indicators.rationale: There is limited furniture, which makes it difficult to set up a comfortable and ergonomic workstation.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The presence of a bed and minimal furniture makes it challenging to set up a comfortable and ergonomic workstation. The large window and low lighting also pose potential distractions and may require additional measures to create a suitable working environment.
